verses.text: Israel mi khempeuh khangsimna-ah kiciamteh a, Israel Kumpite' Laibu sungah tuate kigelh hi. Amau thumanlohna hangin gimpiakna-in Babylon-ah salin Judah mite kipaipih hi
Tu-in amau' neihsa amau' khuapite sungah a tengkik masate pen Israel nautangte, siampite, Levi mite, leh biakinn nasemte ahi uh hi
Tua ciangin Judah, Benjamin, Efraim, leh Manasseh mi pawlkhat Jerusalem-ah teng uh a, tua a tengte
Judah tapa Perez' tapate sung panin Bani' tapa Imri, a tapa Omri, a tapa Ammihud, a tapa Uthai a makai ahi hi
Tua ciangin Judah tapa Shelah mite sung panin: Innkuan lutang Asaiah a makai ahi hi
Judah tapa Zerah mite sung panin: Jeuel a makai ahi hi. Judah minam sung panin innkuan za guk leh sawmkua ahi hi
Benjamin mite sung panin: Hassenuah' tapa Hodaviah, a tapa Meshullam, a tapa Sallu ahi hi
Tua ciangin Jehoram' tapa Ibneiah, Makri' ta Uri, a tapa Elah, leh Ibnijah' ta Reuel, a tapa Shefatiah, a tapa Meshullam ahi hi
Benjamin minamte sung panin innkuan za kua leh sawmnga leh guk ahi hi. Hih min kilote khempeuh pen amau' beh ciatah beh lutangte ahi uh hi
Siampite' sung panin: Jedaiah, Jehoiarib, Jakhin
leh Ahitub' tapa Meraioth, a tapa Zadok, a tapa Meshullam, a tapa Hilkiah' tapa Azariah, (Pasian' biakinn sung a ukpipa
leh Malkhijah' tapa Pashhur, a tapa Jehoram' tapa Adaiah, leh Immer' tapa Meshilemith, a tapa Meshulam, a tapa Jahzerah, a tapa Adiel' tapa Maasai ahi hi
Hihte banah amau' behte, a beh lutangte, Pasian' biakinn-ah nasepna dingin a siam mahmah mihing tul khat leh za sagih leh sawmguk ahi hi
Levi mite sung panin: Merari' tapate sung pan Hashabiah, a tapa Azrikam, a tapa Hasshub' tapa Shemaiah
leh Bakbakkar, Heresh, Galal, leh Asaf' tapa Zikri, a tapa Mika' tapa Mattaniah
leh Jeduthun' tapa Galal, a tapa Shemaiah' tapa Obadiah, leh Netofah khuaneute sungah a teng, Elkanah' tapa Asa' tapa Berekhiah ahi hi
Kulhkongpi cingte: Shallum, Akkub, Talmon, leh Ahiman hi a, Shallum pen amau' makaipa ahi hi
Tudongin Kumpipa' Kulhkongpi nisuahna lampangah a omte ahi uh hi. Hihte pen Levi mite' omna kongcingte ahi ngei uh hi

A pu a pate uh, biakbuk lutna mun a cing, Topa' phual a ukte ahih uh mah bangin Korah' tapa Ebiasaf, a tapa Kore' tapa Shallum, leh a behte ahi Korah mite pen nasepna a uk, puanbuk kong a cingte ahi uh hi
Eleazar' tapa Finehas pen a beisa hun sungah amaute a ukpa hi a, Topa in amah ompih hi
Meshelemiah' tapa Zekhariah pen kikhopna puanbuk lutna-ah kongcingpa ahi hi
Kongcingin a kiteel hih mite khempeuh za nih leh sawmlenih ahi hi. Amaute pen a khuaneute uh-a khangsimna-ah kiciamteh uh hi. David leh thumupa Samuel in amau' pan'mun-ah amaute phut hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute leh a suan a khakte uh Topa' biakinn kulhkongpite a uk, a cingte ahi uh hi
Kongpi cingte pen a pang li, nisuahna, nitumna, leilu, leh leitaw lamah om uh hi
Tua ciangin amau' khuaneute sungah a om a behte uh hih mite tawh a om dingin a hun hunin ni sagih simin a hong pai ding uh a kisam ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Levi mi kongpi a cing ukpi lite pen biakinn sungte leh Pasian' biakinn van manpha koihnate a uk ahi uh hi
Pasian' biakinn kiimah amaute giak uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah vilna nasep, leh zingsang simin kong a hon' ding uh nasep kiguan hi
Amaute pawlkhat in biakinn sunga kizang umlebeelte uk uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua nazatte hong kitumpih ciang hita leh a kilakkhiat ciang hita leh a malzah a sim ding uh kisam hi
Amau sung pan adang pawlkhatte pen tutphah sabuaite, leh a kituam koih umlebeel, anneelte, leenggahzute, sathaute, paknamtuite, leh a namtui nate zong a en dingin kiseh hi
Siampite' ta a dangte in a namtui nate hel dingin bawl uh a
tua ciangin Levi mite lak pan Korah mi Shallum' tacil Mattithiah in biakna ding moh pheengte bawl ding uk hi
Kohath mi amau' behte pawlkhat in zong Sabbath simin koih ding Ompihna Anlum uk uh hi
Tu-in hihte pen lasate, Levi mi beh lutangte, nasep dangte panin pengin biakinn deite sungah a tengte ahi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in sun leh zanin na sem uh hi
Hihte pen Jerusalem-ah a teng amau' khang tawh kizui-in makaite, Levi mi beh lutangte ahi uh hi.
Gibeon-ah tua khuapi a satpa Jeiel teng a, ama zi' min Maakah hi-in
a tapa upa pen Abdon, tua ciangin Zur, Kish, Baal, Ner, Nadab
Gedor, Ahio, Zekhariah, leh Mikloth ahi uh hi
Mikloth pen Shimeah' pa ahi hi. Amau' suanlekhakte zong Jerusalem-a a behte uh galkhatah a behte uh tawh teng uh hi
Ner pen Kish' pa, Kish pen Saul' pa ahi hi. Saul pen Jonathan, Makhishua, Abinadab, leh Eshbaal' pa ahi hi
Jonathan' tapa Meribbaal hi a, Meribbaal pen Mikah' pa ahi hi
Mikah' tapate: Pithon, Melek, Tahrea, leh Ahaz ahi uh hi
Ahaz pen Jarah' pa hi a, Jarah pen Alemeth, Azmaveth, leh Zimri' pa ahi hi. Zimri pen Moza' pa ahi hi
Moza pen Binea' pa ahi hi. A tapa Refaiah, a tapa Eleasah, a tapa Azel ahi hi
Azel in tapa guk nei a, tuate' min: Azrikam, Bokheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah, leh Hanan ahi uh hi. Hihte pen Azel' tapate ahi uh hi.
